data.title: Refactor dso-setup.sh to source artifact-merge-lib.sh and delegate merge_precommit_hooks
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh to source artifact-merge-lib.sh and remove the inline merge_precommit_hooks() definition (now in the shared lib). This is a pure refactor — same behavior, different source. Existing test-dso-setup.sh validates the refactor.

### Implementation:
1. Add near top of dso-setup.sh (after PLUGIN_ROOT resolution): `source "$_DSO_PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/artifact-merge-lib.sh"`
2. Remove the inline merge_precommit_hooks() function definition (~140 lines)
3. All existing calls to merge_precommit_hooks remain unchanged — they now resolve to the sourced lib version

### TDD Exemption Justification
test-exempt: criterion 2 (change-detector — restructuring code location without altering observable behavior). Existing test-dso-setup.sh tests verify merge behavior end-to-end and will catch any regression from the source refactoring.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh | modify |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — existing dso-setup tests still pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] dso-setup.sh sources artifact-merge-lib.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'artifact-merge-lib.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh
- [ ] Inline merge_precommit_hooks definition removed from dso-setup.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q '^merge_precommit_hooks()' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh
- [ ] merge_precommit_hooks still callable after sourcing
  Verify: bash -c '_DSO_PLUGIN_DIR=$(cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso && pwd) && source $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh --dryrun /tmp/test-refactor $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso 2>/dev/null; type merge_precommit_hooks' 2>/dev/null || echo "VERIFY_MANUALLY"

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required. Document all assumptions.
